properties.titulo_evento: White House asks Congress for $87.6 billion, mostly for Iran war
properties.descricao: The request includes $67.15 billion for the military, including $21 billion for munitions and to strengthen the U.S. industrial base.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany scraps F126 frigate program, pivots to MEKO warships amid cost and contractor chaos
properties.descricao: Germany Navy leaders have already blessed the fallback ships as capable of meeting NATO capability requirements, but an alliance deadline looms.

properties.titulo_evento: Tank maker KNDS plans stock market listing, Germany to buy 40% stake
properties.descricao: The firm showed a proposed battle tank at Eurosatory defense exhibition in Paris boasting a French turret and gun mounted on a German Leopard 2 chassis.

properties.titulo_evento: US Senate joins House in voting to halt Iran war
properties.descricao: It marks the first time both chambers approved directing a president to remove armed forces from hostilities since the War Powers Act was adopted in 1973.

properties.titulo_evento: Frustrating Israel, fiber-optic killer drone technology has arrived in southern Lebanon
properties.descricao: Analysts believe that any military engaged in conflict will, in one form or another, encounter technologies first seen in Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes live: Tremors of 7.5 and 7.2 hit near Caracas
properties.descricao: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake hit Venezuela near city of Moron, followed by a stronger magnitude 7.5 quake in same area.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela struck by back-to-back earthquakes, many casualties feared
properties.descricao: US Geological Survey says high casualties 'probable' after powerful quakes hit South American country.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: US vows to defend Gulf interests; Israel kills 2 in Lebanon
properties.descricao: Rubio promises to protect Gulf interests in talks with Iran, as Israel says it will not withdraw from southern Lebanon.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump slams NATO over lax participation in Iran war in talk with Mark Rutte
properties.descricao: NATO chief Mark Rutte points to use of US bases in Europe as he stresses support for US war on Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump White House requests $87.6bn in spending, including for Iran war
properties.descricao: The request is likely to face an uphill battle in Congress, which voted a day earlier to rein in Trump's war powers.

properties.titulo_evento: Top European leaders vow ‘strong’ support for Ukraine ahead of NATO summit
properties.descricao: E5 talks in Berlin took place between heads of state of Britain, France, Italy, Poland and Germany ahead of July summit.

properties.titulo_evento: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
properties.descricao: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

properties.titulo_evento: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
properties.descricao: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

properties.titulo_evento: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
properties.descricao: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

properties.titulo_evento: Colombia's left-wing presidential candidate concedes defeat
properties.descricao: Senator Iván Cepeda was beaten by right-wing businessman Abelardo de la Espriella by less than a percentage point.

properties.titulo_evento: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
properties.descricao: Experts say Trump is likely to ignore it, but that even though it carries little power, it is politically significant.

properties.titulo_evento: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
properties.descricao: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany rail network briefly halted nationwide due to IT malfunction
properties.descricao: Rail company Deutsche Bahn had to pause train services across the country for more than two-and-a-half hours.

properties.titulo_evento: Why are there holiday delay warnings over the EU's new border system?
properties.descricao: The EU's much-delayed Entry/Exit System will change the way UK passengers travel to 29 countries.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East live: Trump seeks $88 billion in extra funding, mostly for Iran war
properties.descricao: US President Donald Trump asked Congress on Wednesday for nearly $88 billion in extra spending, most of it to cover the cost of the Iran war, at a moment of growing unease in both parties over the conflict and its political price. Follow our liveblo...

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela hit by back-to-back powerful earthquakes, buildings collapse in Caracas
properties.descricao: Two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela minutes apart on Wednesday, collapsing buildings in the capital, Caracas. The US Geological Survey said a magnitude 7.1 quake hit near Morón at a depth of 13 km, followed one minute later by a stronger 7.5-m...

properties.titulo_evento: Rubio assures Gulf allies US will protect interests in Iran peace talks
properties.descricao: Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Wednesday assured Gulf allies that Washington would protect their interests as it pursues a final settlement with Iran. President Donald Trump said talks were progressing well, while requesting nearly $88 billion in...

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says NATO allies ‘let down’ US by not backing Iran war
properties.descricao: Trump told NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte on Wednesday he was disappointed that alliance members did not back the US military campaign against Iran, saying Washington had "demolished" Iran without needing assistance. Rutte defended allies, noting...

properties.titulo_evento: Haiti - Morocco: five-goal thriller with late Atlas Lions surge
properties.descricao: Morocco faced Haiti in a decisive final Group C match and secured a 4-2 victory in a chaotic, end-to-end encounter. However, with Brazil beating Scotland 3-0 and holding a superior goal difference, the Seleção finish top of the group, leaving Morocc...

properties.titulo_evento: US in 'panic' at prospect of Gulf States going it alone, analyst says
properties.descricao: Secretary of State Marco Rubio promised the United States' Gulf allies that Washington would protect their interests as it seeks to hammer out a final settlement of the Middle East war in talks with Iran. Speaking with FRANCE 24's Sharon Gaffney, in...

properties.titulo_evento: Power outages and melting roads: Heatwave strains French infrastructure
properties.descricao: Power outages, train delays, and melting roads - the heatwave is straining France's infrastructure. Electricity provider EDF says it has had to reduce its nuclear power output, but that it still has enough capacity to meet demand. Also in the show -...

properties.titulo_evento: Europe leaders reaffirm unity on defence ahead of Ankara NATO summit
properties.descricao: European leaders met Wednesday in Berlin ahead of next month's NATO summit in Ankarai to discuss European defence and security guarantees for Ukraine, following tensions with the United States and among the main European members.

properties.titulo_evento: Did Qatar's prime minister 'snub' JD Vance? Doha, Washington deny claim
properties.descricao: A viral clip from the first round of US-Iran peace talks in Switzerland fuelled online speculation that US Vice President JD Vance was snubbed by Qatar’s Prime Minister, after users claimed the video shows him "ignore" Vance in favour of greeting Pa...

properties.titulo_evento: Buildings collapse after back-to-back quakes rock Venezuela
properties.descricao: The United States Geological Survey said high casualties and extensive damage are probable in Venezuela after two strong earthquakes rattled the capital and surrounding regions.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela hit by two powerful earthquakes
properties.descricao: Strong earthquakes struck west of Venezuela's capital just seconds apart, bringing down buildings in Caracas.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's Merz rallies European NATO allies ahead of summit
properties.descricao: Chancellor Friedrich Merz hosted leaders of European NATO powers in Berlin to hash out consensus on bolstering European defense. With US tensions looming, the leaders signaled that transatlantic ties are improving.

properties.titulo_evento: What does British PM's resignation mean for European security?
properties.descricao: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer was widely known for his support of Ukraine and his efforts towards a new EU–UK defense partnership. What will happen to those policies now that Starmer has announced his resignation?

properties.titulo_evento: Iran after the war — fragile peace, shattered economy
properties.descricao: The US has temporarily allowed Iran to export oil and indicated it will provide billions to relieve the crisis triggered by the war. With ordinary Iranians at their limit, however, Tehran already fears new protests.

properties.titulo_evento: Climate change: Heatwave costs the German economy billions
properties.descricao: Never before has a June been as hot in Germany as in 2026. This has consequences not only for people and nature, but also for businesses. Heat reduces productivity and causes illness, while cooling is expensive.

properties.titulo_evento: Southeast Asia boost defense ties but avoids firm alliances
properties.descricao: Countries across the region are expanding defense cooperation in ways that change the South China Sea equation but fall short of a new anti-China bloc.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump offers Iran an economic lifeline — with strings
properties.descricao: Iran has seen a speedy rebound in oil exports after the US-Iran deal granted immediate waivers on US sanctions. Relief on frozen assets and a $300 billion reconstruction fund now hinge on Tehran meeting key conditions.

properties.titulo_evento: North Korean soldier crosses border to South
properties.descricao: South Korea's military says it is investigating the soldier's reasons for crossing the inner-Korean border. While dozens of North Koreans flee each year, usually via China, crossing directly south is very rare.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran nuclear inspections 'going to happen,' says IAEA head
properties.descricao: After contradicting US and Iranian statements, the UN nuclear agency said inspections of Iran's nuclear sites would take place. Iran's top negotiator called the US-Iran deal "America's declaration of defeat." More at DW.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Major warship project to be scrapped
properties.descricao: The Defense Ministry is dropping a multi-billion-euro project to build F126 frigates, media say. And train services have resumed after a communications glitch overnight halted Germany's rail network . DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Poland, Ukraine: Dispute between two close allies deepens
properties.descricao: Polish President Karol Nawrocki last week stripped Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy of Poland's highest state honor. How did it come to this? And what has it got to do with next year's election in Poland?

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine says major Crimea bridge destroyed in latest attack
properties.descricao: Ukraine continues to hit infrastructure on the Crimea to isolate the Russian-annexed peninsula. Meanwhile, Russia attacked Volodymyr Zelenskyy's hometown with a ballistic missile in a deadly strike.

properties.titulo_evento: European leaders pledge stronger role in NATO before Trump-Rutte talks
properties.descricao: The E5 group also called for Ukraine aid to rank high on the agenda at the upcoming  alliance summit in Ankara.

properties.titulo_evento: Italy allowed US planes to use bases in Iran war, NATO’s Rutte says
properties.descricao: 500 planes took off from American bases in Italy, the alliance's secretary-general says, adding thousands of jets flew to Iran from Europe.

properties.titulo_evento: A.I. Riches Fuel Economic Divide in Asia’s Chip Powerhouses
properties.descricao: A.I. demand is driving stock market gains and booming exports in South Korea and Taiwan. But the rest of the economy is being left behind.

properties.titulo_evento: Alibaba Sues Pentagon Over China Military Label
properties.descricao: The Chinese tech giant said it had no ties to China’s military and that the U.S. government had violated the law by making that claim.

properties.titulo_evento: The Iran War’s Persistent Threat to Farmers in Poor Countries
properties.descricao: A reopening of the Strait of Hormuz would do little to swiftly ease the pain inflicted by higher prices for fertilizer, food and fuel in Ivory Coast.
